title: 4 Pack S143 Pre-Motor Filters Compatible with Hoover HF1 PLUS Cordless Vacuum Cleaner: HF1P10P 011, HF1P10H 011, HF1P10PX 011, HF1P10HX 011, HF1P10P 001, HF1P10H 001, HF1PZ10H 011, HF1P10HX1011
features: 【Compatible Models】Compatible with Hoover HF1 PLUS cordless vacuum cleaners: HF1P10P 011, HF1P10H 011, HF1P10PX 011, HF1P10HX 011, HF1P10P 001, HF1P10H 001, HF1PZ10H 011, HF1P10HX1011, HF1P10P2 011, HF1PZ10H 001
【Package Contents】Includes 4 pack S143 replacement pre-motor filters. Replace every 2–4 months for peak vacuum performance, powerful suction and efficient cleaning every time.

【High-Efficiency Filtration】Powered by high-performance filter sets, this system effectively captures 99.97% of dust, pet dander, hair etc. Enjoy fresh, clean, healthy air in your living space nonstop — all day and night.
【Tool-Free Install & Reusable Filters】 Washable & reusable with quick install and replace — our filters keep vacuums running optimally, avoid clogs, ease motor burden, and lengthen cleaner lifespan.
【Dedicated Beaufan Customer Support】Any purchase-related questions? Reach out to our team — we prioritize fast, reliable support for every enquiry.
